# MODULE_NAME

Operan Module 0X — MODULE_NAME

## Purpose

> One-line description from PRD

## Architecture

- **Protocol**: REST / Async / Both
- **Port**: 8080 (HTTP), 5672 (AMQP)
- **Data Store**: PostgreSQL + Redis + Kafka
- **Isolation**: Tenant-scoped

## Endpoints

### REST (OpenAPI)

See `contracts/v1/openapi-MODULE_ID-MODULE_NAME.yaml`

### Events (AsyncAPI)

See `contracts/v1/asyncapi-MODULE_ID-MODULE_NAME.yaml`

### Schemas (JSON Schema)

See `contracts/v1/schema-MODULE_ID-MODULE_NAME.json`

## Dependencies

| Module | Protocol | Direction | SLA (p99) |
|--------|----------|-----------|-----------|
| M01 Tenant Control | REST | callee | 100ms |
| M02 IAM | REST | callee | 50ms |
| ... | ... | ... | ... |

See `contracts/v1/integration-graph.yaml` for full dependency graph.

## Local Development

```bash
# Start with Docker Compose
docker compose -f docker-compose.module.yaml up -d

# Run tests
make test

# Run linters
make lint
```

## Deployment

### Helm

```bash
helm install operan-MODULE_NAME contracts/v1/scaffold/helm/ \
  --namespace operan-production \
  --set image.repository=ghcr.io/alimazraeh/operan/MODULE_NAME \
  --set image.tag=v1.0.0
```

## Observability

- **Tracing**: OpenTelemetry (OTLP endpoint: `otel-collector:4317`)
- **Metrics**: Prometheus metrics endpoint at `/metrics`
- **Logging**: Structured JSON to stdout
- **Health**: `/health` and `/ready` endpoints

## Security

- All endpoints require BearerAuth (JWT)
- All requests require `X-Tenant-ID` header
- Network policies restrict inter-module traffic
- Non-root container execution

## Contract Files

| File | Protocol | Purpose |
|------|----------|---------|
| `openapi-MODULE_ID-MODULE_NAME.yaml` | OpenAPI 3.1.0 | REST API |
| `asyncapi-MODULE_ID-MODULE_NAME.yaml` | AsyncAPI 2.6 | Event schema |
| `schema-MODULE_ID-MODULE_NAME.json` | JSON Schema draft-07 | Data models |

## CI/CD

- **CI**: `.github/workflows/ci.yaml` — lint, validate, test, build
- **CD**: `.github/workflows/cd.yaml` — canary deployment to production
